name: Crosshair
description: Targeting crosshairs ringing a centre, the reticle re-inking on reseed.

code.style: --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { width: 84%; height: 84%; margin: 8%; border-radius: 50%; border: calc(7px / @Y) solid @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); box-sizing: border-box; :before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 46%; top: -12%; width: 8%; height: 124%; background: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: -12%; top: 46%; width: 124%; height: 8%; background: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; } } -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
